title: senecio ertterae
intro: Senecio ertterae, also known as Ertter's ragwort, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family (Asteraceae). It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds. The plant is said to provide various health benefits, such as relieving digestive issues and reducing fever, due to its expectorant and antispasmodic properties. Senecio ertterae is often prepared as a tea or tincture for medicinal use, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
